classes.name: DynamicCovarianceOptimizer
classes.text: Conjugate gradient optimizer with Polak-Ribiere direction updates and Brent line search. Maintains orthogonal basis of past search directions via Gram-Schmidt. Derives adaptive variance from a power-law schedule. Optional explicit free energy F = KL divergence minus differential entropy H = 0.5 (n log 2 pi e + log det Sigma) from the search-direction covariance. minimize() in ConjGradOptimizer.cpp.

classes.name: DynamicCovarianceCostFunction
classes.text: VNL vnl_cost_function base class bridging the conjugate gradient optimizer to the objective function. Prescription derives from it.

classes.name: VOITerm
classes.text: Abstract base class for per-structure objective function terms. Pure virtual Eval computing value and gradient, and Clone for pyramid copies. Owns a Structure region of interest and a histogram with gradient.

classes.name: KLDivTerm
classes.text: Kullback-Leibler divergence objective term minimizing KL between calculated and target dose-volume histograms, sum over bins of calcGPDF log calcGPDF over targetGPDF. Convolves dose-volume points with dual Gaussian kernels at varMin and varMax. Gradient via product rule chain. Log-ratio and cross-entropy modes. Eval in KLDivTerm.cpp.

classes.name: Prescription
classes.text: Objective function aggregator computing weighted sum of VOITerm evaluations. CalcSumSigmoid accumulates weighted beamlet volumes with adaptive variance fractions. Sigmoid parameterization mapping unbounded optimizer variables to bounded beamlet weights via Transform dTransform InvTransform with SIGMOID_SCALE 0.2 and transform-slope variance correction variance times dSigmoid squared.

classes.name: CBeamDoseCalc
classes.text: TERMA total energy released in medium ray tracer. Resamples CT density, traces pencil-beam rays from source through beamlet aperture, trilinear density interpolation, accumulates energy to voxel neighborhoods UpdateTermaNeighborhood, then invokes kernel sphere convolution. CalcTerma in BeamDoseCalc.cpp.

classes.name: CEnergyDepKernel
classes.text: Energy deposition kernel with cumulative energy lookup table indexed by phi angle and radial distance. CalcSphereConvolve iterates slice voxels and calls CalcSphereTrace for radial ray integration via LUT interpolation, normalized by mass density and azimuthal sum 1 over NUM_THETA. Loaded from kernel.dat files.

classes.name: SphereConvolve
classes.text: Spherical kernel convolution manager building direction and offset lookup tables from kernel geometry ComputeSphereLUT, driving per-voxel CalcSphereTrace and InterpCumEnergy. Computes dose equals TERMA convolved with energy kernel.

classes.name: CHistogram
classes.text: Dose-volume histogram with Gaussian smoothing. Bins dose into fixed-width array, applies dual Gaussian kernels varMin varMax to form smoothed GBins, keeps fractional volume weights for linear interpolation between bin levels. ConvGauss GetBinForValue SetBinning.

classes.name: CHistogramWithGradient
classes.text: Extends CHistogram with per-beamlet derivative volumes grouped by beam. Computes bin derivatives by product rule with binning fractions and Gaussian-smooths them via Conv_dGauss. The dose to histogram partial derivative store driving the optimization gradient chain. Get_dBins Get_dGBins.

classes.name: PlanPyramid
classes.text: Coarse-to-fine multi-scale hierarchy of four plans, each doubling dose resolution and beamlet spacing. InvFiltIntensityMap transfers intensity maps between levels using a binomial filter 0.25 0.50 0.25. Generates coarse pencil sub-beamlets.

classes.name: PlanOptimizer
classes.text: Multi-level optimization orchestrator managing per-level Prescription and DynamicCovarianceOptimizer pairs from coarse to fine, inverse-filtering the state vector into the next finer level. GetStateVectorFromPlan SetStateVectorToPlan move beamlet weights. Optimize in PlanOptimizer.cpp.

classes.name: Plan
classes.text: Treatment plan container holding beams, dose volume, resampled mass density, and energy kernel defaulting to 6 MeV. GetTotalBeamletCount sums across beams.

classes.name: Beam
classes.text: Single radiation beam with gantry angle, isocenter, one-dimensional intensity map, and computed dose volume. OnIntensityMapChanged regenerates beamlets from weights. GetBeamlet.

classes.name: Series
classes.text: Imaging dataset grouping a CT density volume and an array of Structure regions of interest.

classes.name: Structure
classes.text: Region of interest as polygon spatial-object contours. ContoursToRegion rasterizes to multi-scale binary volumes. Type target eTARGET or organ at risk eOAR.

classes.name: PlanXmlReader/PlanXmlWriter
classes.text: ITK XML serialization reading and writing the whole treatment plan: beams, intensity maps, prescriptions, dose-volume histograms, dose calculation parameters.

classes.name: CBrimstoneApp
classes.text: MFC application entry point and initialization.

classes.name: CBrimstoneDoc
classes.text: MFC document owning the Series and Plan objects and handling document serialization.

classes.name: CBrimstoneView/CPlanarView
classes.text: MFC views rendering 2D CT image slices, contours, and dose overlays.

classes.name: CSeriesDicomImporter
classes.text: Imports DICOM CT image series and RT structure sets into the Series data model.

classes.name: OptThread
classes.text: Background worker thread running the optimization by driving the RtModel PlanOptimizer.

classes.name: OptimizerDashboard
classes.text: Real-time visualization of optimization progress and metrics.

classes.name: CGraph
classes.text: Interactive MFC 2D plot window with axes, legend, and draggable data points for DVH and iteration curves.

classes.name: CDataSeries
classes.text: Abstract curve data container with color and line style.

classes.name: CHistogramDataSeries
classes.text: Binned dose-volume histogram data series.

classes.name: CTargetDVHSeries
classes.text: Target or prescription DVH overlay series.

classes.name: CVectorD/CMatrixD/CMatrixNxM
classes.text: Templated vector and matrix classes with least-squares solvers and matrix operations.

classes.name: VectorD/MatrixD/MatrixNxM
classes.text: Refactored templated vector and matrix base classes with inline implementations.

classes.name: BufferND/MeshND/Field/BufferIndex
classes.text: N-dimensional grid and buffer container abstractions for spatially organized data.

classes.name: Polygon
classes.text: Serializable observable 2D polygon geometry primitive with MFC CArchive support.

classes.name: CVolume
classes.text: Volumep three-dimensional voxel grid template for density and dose volumes.

classes.name: CModelObject
classes.text: Observable serializable hierarchical base model object underpinning all domain objects.

classes.name: Observer pattern
classes.text: CObservableObject and CObservableEvent implementing the observer notification pattern.

classes.name: Cluster
classes.text: K-means clustering over geometric point data.

classes.name: AffineTransform
classes.text: Affine geometric transform for points and meshes.

classes.name: TPS
classes.text: Thin-plate spline non-rigid geometric transformation.

classes.name: Mesh
classes.text: Three-dimensional mesh geometry object.

classes.name: GradientCalculator
classes.text: Computes spatial gradients over geometric scalar fields.

classes.name: SceneView/Camera/Renderable
classes.text: Direct3D 8 scene rendering framework with camera, lights, renderables, and object explorer tree, plus rotate and zoom interaction trackers.

classes.name: line-search optimizers
classes.text: One-dimensional line-search optimizers Brent Powell and conjugate gradient as generic templates.

classes.name: ND optimizers
classes.text: N-dimensional optimizers Brent Powell conjugate gradient DFP gradient descent and cubic interpolation.

classes.name: COpenGLRenderer/COpenGLView
classes.text: OpenGL rendering base classes with camera, light, texture, and interaction trackers.

classes.name: ObjectExplorer/Graph/Dib/DrawTool
classes.text: Reusable MFC GUI widgets: object tree explorer, plot, device-independent bitmap, draw tool, tab control bar.

classes.name: InPlaneResampleImageFilter
classes.text: ITK ImageToImageFilter resampling 3D volumes in-plane with linear or nearest-neighbor interpolation.

classes.name: IntensityMapAccumulateImageFilter
classes.text: ITK filter accumulating dose by weighted pixel-wise multiply and add of beamlet intensity maps, IPP accelerated.

classes.name: ContoursToRegionFilter
classes.text: ITK filter rasterizing polygon contours into a binary region mask volume.

classes.name: CXMLLogFile
classes.text: Thread-safe singleton writing structured nested XML diagnostic logs to a FILE pointer.

classes.name: CXMLElement
classes.text: Scoped RAII XML tag element managing nesting of attributes and text.

classes.name: Mesh
classes.text: COM ATL mesh object exposing IMesh with FileStorage IPersistStorage save and load.

classes.name: FileStorage
classes.text: COM persistence interface saving and loading geometry to a pathname or stream.

classes.name: TCP_NTCP_Optimizer
classes.text: Tumor control probability and normal tissue complication probability based dose optimizer in the legacy RT model.

classes.name: DicomImporter
classes.text: Legacy DICOM series and structure set importer.

classes.name: BeamRenderable/MachineRenderable
classes.text: Direct3D renderables drawing treatment beams and the treatment machine, with beam parameter control panels.

classes.name: TreatmentMachine
classes.text: Virtual-simulation treatment machine model alongside Plan Series Beam.

classes.name: fluence integration
classes.text: Divergent fluence calculation integrating exponential attenuation, inverse-square falloff, heterogeneous density, and field divergence over a CVolume.

classes.name: pencil beam convolution
classes.text: Fortran pencil-beam in-density convolution: ray-trace through heterogeneous phantom with spherical convolve kernels and energy lookup interpolation.

classes.name: ct_to_md_values
classes.text: Converts CT Hounsfield unit values to mass density via piecewise calibration, ITK based.

classes.name: rotate_density_for_beam
classes.text: Rotates a density volume to a beam gantry angle for ray-traced dose calculation.

classes.name: terma_from_density
classes.text: Computes TERMA total energy released in medium by ray-tracing through a density volume.

classes.name: entropy maximization
classes.text: Gradient-descent entropy maximization over image and histogram distributions, with MNIST autoencoder and variational autoencoder experiments.
